posts.text:
the incentives are 100% in favor of releasing as quickly as feasible. the only thing they accomplish by lagging is to let other open weights fill the gap.

labs will either release immediately, or only after the models are so old and surpassed that no one will care.

reply_context.text: thinking it's good for frontier labs that open source models trail by <1 year. credible threat not too far away to drive demand. but they gotta keep jumping far enough with capabilities to justify the costs

posts.text:
In very specific situations (and with a small experimental sample), top-down factors like prior knowledge, emotions or desires can directly shape perceptual experience and appreciably alter how items appear, new research suggests: 

buff.ly/IrmfKrj

I think "therapy speak" would be more accurate. The purpose of framing it this way is to disconnect the person's transient state of affairs from their sense of personal identity. It's the difference between "I AM a criminal" and "I committed a crime".

But also yeah, never heard this one in my life.

reply_context.text: weird example, basically nobody uses that
